headline: A Look At Goldman Sachs (GS) Valuation As Private Credit Risks And Regulatory Scrutiny Intensify
summary: Goldman Sachs Group (GS) is back in focus after a stream of new fixed income deals, including fresh 5% senior notes due 2036, alongside rising debate about its risk exposure, regulation, and sensitivity to inflation-driven market swings. See our latest analysis for Goldman Sachs Group. The recent flurry of new notes has arrived during a choppy spell for the shares, with a 7.79% decline in the 1 month share price return and a 5.66% year to date share price pullback. However, the 1 year total...

headline: Tracking the gold trade: 3 reasons Wall Street is still bullish
summary: Gold (GC=F) prices have been volatile this week due to impacts from the Iran war, but overall, the precious metal has rallied over the past few years as investors continue to seek safety amid increased uncertainty. Market Catalysts host Julie Hyman tracks the precious metal's biggest milestones over the past several years, while Yahoo Finance Senior Business Reporter Ines Ferré takes a look at recent calls on gold from firms like JPMorgan (JPM), Goldman Sachs (GS), and Wells Fargo (WFC), explaining why Wall Street is still so bullish on the commodity. To watch more expert insights and analysis on the latest market action, check out more Market Catalysts.

content.title: Tracking the gold trade: 3 reasons Wall Street is still bullish
content.description:
Gold (GC=F) prices have been volatile this week due to impacts from the Iran war, but overall, the precious metal has rallied over the past few years as investors continue to seek safety amid increased uncertainty.

To watch more expert insights and analysis on the latest market action, check out more Market Catalysts.

headline: Goldman Sachs Names 2 Top HALO Stocks for Its March Conviction List
summary: HALO stocks are starting to attract more attention. These stocks feature a fundamentally sound profile of ‘heavy asset, low obsolescence.’ It’s a profile defined by a combination of high levels of physical capital and lasting economic relevance. HALO stocks can be found in the energy sector, in transport infrastructure, and in heavy industrial equipment. Now, some of Wall Street’s top firms and analysts are starting to turn to halos as conviction names for the near future. Steven Kron, Goldman S

headline: Goldman Sachs Faces Congressional Scrutiny As Leadership And Culture Come Into Focus
summary: The House Oversight Committee has increased scrutiny of Goldman Sachs Group (NYSE:GS) in a high profile investigation connected to Jeffrey Epstein. At the same time, Goldman Sachs has brought back former executive Rob Kaplan as vice chairman, with a remit focused on senior leadership and firm culture. These developments come as Goldman Sachs shares most recently closed at $862.58 and the stock has gained 51.5% over the past year. For you as an investor, these headlines highlight two core...

headline: Oil Price Shocks Have Hit India, But This 1 Emerging Market ETF Is Still a Buy Now Near $40
